<function=python>

# Remove all remaining vertical bars in rows 41-43 and 47-49
# Columns: 39, 44, 49, 54
# Rows 41-43: cols 39, 44, 49, 54
# Rows 47-49: cols 39, 44, 49, 54

for row in [42, 48]:  # Middle of each vertical bar group
    for col in [39, 44, 49, 54]:
        actions.append({'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': row, 'col': col})

result = action(actions)
print(f"Removed remaining vertical bars: level_completed={result.get('level_completed')}")

# Check what changed
curr_ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nCurrent right side bar area (rows 33-49, cols 33-56):")
for r in range(33, 50):
    print(f"  {r}: {curr_ascii[r][33:57]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
